title: pyrus tiantangensis
intro: Pyrus tiantangensis, also known as the Tiantang pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower cholesterol levels and prevent cardiovascular disease due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pyrus tiantangensis include reducing inflammation and improving blood lipid profiles, making it a potential natural remedy for various cardiovascular conditions. The herbal preparations of Pyrus tiantangensis often involve decoction or infusion of its leaves and fruits, which are traditionally used to treat various health issues in Chinese medicine.
